title: Double Duvet Cover Sets - 100% Brushed Microfiber Bedding Quilt Cover with Pillowcases - Mink/Cream
features: The Plain bedding double bed set has a classy look, ideal for daily use. It is non-faded, lightweight, and breathable
Material: 100 percent Microfiber Polyester fabric with 90 GSM. Ensuring durability and a soft touch with fine stitching
Double Set Includes: 1 Bed Cover (200x200cm) And 2 Pillowcases (50x75cm) With Button Closure
Color: Mink and Cream Shade may vary slightly due to lighting effects. OEKO-TEX certified and eco-friendly. Less likely to rip or tear
Easy Care: Machine washable. Do not bleach. Recyclable cardboard packaging. Make a positive impact with your purchase
